summary.zh: 了解中控屏、仪表区、快捷入口和常用车辆状态。
summary.en: Learn about the center display, cluster area, shortcuts, and common vehicle status.

text.zh: 智能座舱首页提供车辆状态、常用控制、电子手册和提醒入口。
text.en: The smart cockpit home screen provides vehicle status, common controls, manual access, and alerts.

summary.zh: 了解如何开启并调节自动空调。
summary.en: Learn how to enable and adjust automatic climate control.

text.zh: 点击中控屏底部的空调入口，进入空调控制面板。
text.en: Tap the climate entry at the bottom of the center display.

text.zh: 开启自动模式后，系统会根据车内温度自动调节风量和出风方向。
text.en: After automatic mode is enabled, the system adjusts fan speed and airflow direction based on cabin temperature.
